title: `Almon #5963
definition:
Almon-diblathaim = "concealing the two cakes"

 1) a station of the Israelites in the wilderness of Moab
nasbUsage:
Definition: Almon-diblathaim = "concealing the two cakes"

 1) a station of the Israelites in the wilderness of Moab

    NASB:  a place in Moab (the same as 1015)
